feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Cage of Roses
entry.summary:
Author: endofer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,720Chapters: 2/14Kudos: 12

Summary: The story Clark had heard wasn't entirely clear and previous monster hunters who'd come investigating had been sent packing, unwilling to talk about it. Some details remained the same between retellings: there was a monstrous creature in this town, it punished crime and protected the town from invasion, and it occasionally asked for a human sacrifice.In a castle overlooking a town lives a monstrous bat creature. It is the town’s protector and a source of fear. Clark Kent hears about these rumours and comes to investigate. A retelling Beauty and the Beast with MonsterHunter!Clark and Beast!Bruce ft. Alfred and a handful of batkids.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: look at us, turned into lyrics
entry.summary:
Author: brucewaynessluttyboots (missakwatson)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,348Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: Rationally, Bruce knows it was bound to happen sooner or later. It’s a minor miracle that it even took this long—a testament to Superman and Batman’s effectiveness as a team, to the fluid coordination they’ve fought hard to hone. That doesn’t make it any easier to stomach, in the moment or while they’re debriefing with the rest of the League.***Or: Superman takes bullets for people all the time—but what happens the first time he takes one for Bruce?

entry.title: An Emerald's Gaze
entry.summary:
Author: Kyronie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,075Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 223

Summary: "Guys are we sure this is the correct place?' Clint asked pushing his way through rock and rubble. "Guys!" Natasha called out standing over an unknown substance on the ground. When the Avengers answered the alarm about a surge in magical energy in Queens, they were expecting finding Loki or another sorcerer. Finding a freshly resurrected Spider-Man sitting in a green fluorescent puddle was not on that list. OR Peter Parker is revived using the Lazarus Pits and the Avengers have to figure out how their youngest member has returned from the dead. Also why he now looks like a green eyed skunk. Bruce Wayne wants to know why his family's tragedy was done again.

entry.title: sunflower state
entry.summary:
Author: floatingflowers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,703Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 187

Summary: “What you thinking so hard about?” Clark asked, his large hand coming to rest lightly on Bruce’s thigh. Bruce blinked out of his reverie, turning to look at Clark’s profile as the man focused on the road. His curls fluttered around in the breeze of the AC, and his eyes sparkled with energy from the sun. Clark’s red flannel shirt that Bruce pretended to hate was rolled up to his elbows, unintentionally showing off his powerful forearms. To Bruce, he was the most gorgeous man in the world. “You.” Bruce replied, uncharacteristically sentimental. He was rewarded with Clark’s small, shy smile, and traces of red colouring his cheeks, tracing up to the tips of his ears. Clark didn’t respond, and Bruce took some satisfaction in his ability to render Clark speechless, but he felt Clark’s love all the same, the other man gently squeezing his thigh. “Get a room!” Dick gagged from the back, wriggling around with his seatbelt. Bruce hit his head back against the headrest once more. It would be a long twenty minutes to Smallville. Or: Clark takes Bruce and Dick to Smallville to meet his parents

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: Clockwork76

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 674Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

entry.title: you know the two of us are just young gods
entry.summary:
Author: chilling_with_ducks

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,955Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 210

Summary: “He- he can’t- he doesn’t- he’s human?!” “Uh huh.” When she finally manages to salvage some dignity, Superman is already about a foot in the air, smiling something small and unbelievably fond. She scrambles to follow. “Incredible, isn’t he?” Courtney nods vigorously, and then finally registers exactly what it was that Batman had said. “The entire Watchtower?!” Superman actually scoffs. “Yeah. He’s rich rich.”Or:5 times Bruce is human, and how Clark loves him for it.

entry.title: The Fifth Letter
entry.summary:
Author: ObsidianWings_Ink

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,874Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 13

Summary: ​In a universe where the gifted attend the prestigious Academy of Superheroes, fifteen-year-old Bruce Wayne is just a powerless orphan from the bleak streets of Gotham. He has sent five letters, pleading for a single chance. He expected another rejection; he didn't expect a confrontation with Roman Sionis to unlock something mysterious in a dark alleyway.​New romances, new friendships, and new adventures await him—along with a tragic event that lies ahead. ​(More tags will be added as the story progresses.)

entry.title: Your Mom
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,461Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 127

Summary: A Tuesday night at Clark’s apartment was supposed to be a normal, human affair—complete with a strict ban on superpowers in the kitchen and Clark stubbornly trying to prove he can cook. But when Bruce nonchalantly reveals who he’s been intensely texting all evening, Clark's world is turned upside down.   As it turns out, Gotham's dark vigilante and Martha Kent have been secret text-buddies for six months, trading gardening tips, recipes, and embarrassing stories about Clark. Over a bowl of "cheated" homemade ice cream, Clark is left drowning in pure, overwhelming affection for his brilliant, guarded boyfriend—who, despite all his brooding, simply cannot say no to Mrs. Kent.

entry.title: The Curse of Lady Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: NeptonicMistakes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,669Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Gotham has a cryptid that has been roaming its streets, protecting its city, for nearly 200 years. Jimmy wants to solve the mystery of who this cryptid is and drags Clark with him. What happens with Clark discovers things about it that no one has ever. What happens when he realizes there is something hidden but human about it? ---- This is gonna be another long fic! One that will even be Multi-Media (with fanart, mock articles and journal entries)! There might be smut at some point (sep chapter from the rest and marked, able to skip it and not miss major plot)!

entry.title: Out of Line
entry.summary:
Author: qmodo

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 203Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Bruce holds multiple lifetimes worth of emotional and physical scars. Damian entering his life filled deep voids, and his passing created new ones. Never taking the time to process his pain, Bruce lashes out at those closest to him, leaving Diana and Clark to lovingly put him in his place.

entry.title: Turn This Manor into a Home!
entry.summary:
Author: jerrys_21_sided_die

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,312Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 16

Summary: For as long as Bruce can (or chooses) to remember, Wayne Manor has been empty. After Alfred gets fed up with his macho “I’m Batman I don’t need anyone but the night.” attitude he sends Bruce to Haly’s circus to unwind; but thats not what happens, Bruce watches two performers fall to their deaths as their 7 year old son watches. Bruce decides right there and then he won’t let Richard become one of the children lost to Gothams foster care system. Along the way a reporter from the Daily Planet catches wind of this ordeal, as he interviews Richard (with the help of Bruce) he starts to linger more and more around Wayne Manor. As introverted as Bruce is, he likes the reporters company, Richard’s little feet pattering around the manor, and the dinner outings the trio go on every Friday. They make this house (or mansion) a home.

entry.title: come as you are
entry.summary:
Author: thefuzzzz

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,649Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 110

Summary: Someone at the Daily Planet wrote a hate piece on Bruce Wayne. Clark read the whole thing at his kitchen table with his glasses on and a red pen in hand. He found one spelling mistake, three possible grammar mistakes, five complete falsities, and three hundred words of utter bull crap. He didn’t personally know Mr. Wayne, but he’d been to several charity galas and been in the same room as him. He was ditzy, self indulgent, and possibly shallow to his core, sure. He was, however, not ill intentioned, money hungry, or disregarding of others. He had multiple adopted children and held charity galas for every organization under Earth’s yellow sun, for God’s sake. Clark couldn’t stand bad journalism. So, he set out to right this wrong.——————Or, Clark discovers some interesting facts about billionaire, philanthropist, (holy cow, very attractive) Bruce Wayne

entry.title: starstruck
entry.summary:
Author: craycr4y

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,360Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 1,108

Summary: A loud bang shuts down Hal’s train of thoughts, his head swivels towards its direction, wondering if Batman had finally deigned to show up. But it wasn’t him. Instead, the person who shows up is decked out in red and blue; black lines stretch across his suit and meet at his chest to form a symbol of a… spider? Huh. Did Batman change themes? or Spider-Man & Batman are best friends. No, the Justice League doesn't know that. And if you ask Bruce, they never should.Until they do.

entry.title: leave no trace
entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 106,019Chapters: 18/19Kudos: 1,223

Summary: For Superbat Week 2024: Day 6 Firefighter Clark & Dr. Bruce. Clark Kent has been Tower 344’s fire lookout for the last decade. When a camper is injured in the remote woods, he ends up with an unexpected house guest while they wait for the next available medical evacuation.

entry.title: Kinæsthesia
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,511Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 162

Summary: "You are your own worst enemy."- Martha Kent Clark comes home to a city still wearing his symbol like a wound. Bruce comes home to Clark. It takes both of them longer than it should. Features: an opinionated elderly neighbor, a neighborhood that gives a damn, a word in Kryptonian that doesn't translate cleanly, and two men who are catastrophically bad at being afraid in front of each other. The longer version: After the Fortress, after the city's grief and the shaharreth on every wall, Clark Kent comes back to Metropolis and tries to figure out what home means for someone like him. Bruce Wayne is apparently part of that answer. Clark is working on accepting this. This is a story about the specific courage of choosing someone who will die before you do. About the difference between happiness and contentment. About the people who show up for you in your building hallway at six in the morning and the people who put a transponder in your cape because they can't say I was afraid for you any other way. Martha Kent called it. She usually does.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Month in the Life (of Clark Kent)
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,573Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 80

Summary: Clark Kent has been maintaining a careful separation between his identities for three years. Bruce Wayne has been maintaining emotional distance from everything for fifteen. On Monday, they prevent an interdimensional collapse together and accidentally reveal their secret identities to each other. On Tuesday, they have their first date. On Wednesday, they go viral. This is Week One. (Or: Clark Kent has four voices arguing in his head at all times, Bruce Wayne conducts tactical analysis on his own feelings, and neither of them is prepared for what happens when an alien who can hear heartbeats falls in love with a human who thinks emotions are a tactical liability. 30 days. Compressed timeline. Everything is on fire.)

entry.summary:
